# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:  # (a)
  name: envoy-filter   #(b)
spec:   
  configType: STRICT_DNS | CERTIFICATE_AUTHORITY | 
                 CLUSTER_RESOURCE  | SERVICE_ACCOUNT| 
                 `ANY TRANSPORT_STYLE `# (c),d,e) #(f): transport style for filters – all/http1: http2 not supported yet.  
     filterChainMatchingRules:   
       - route: "#"      # (#a) This line is to match the request with any routing rule in EnvoyFilter (match type = ANY). Here, we don't specify a specific path for our filters because it will be handled by router.  The '#', which matches all requests at this point
         filter: "#"    # (#b) This line is to match the request with any other Filter in EnvoyFilter (match type = ANY). Here, we don't specify a specific name for our filters because it will be handled by router.  The '#', which matches all requests at this point
